name: OutcomePredictor
description: At action commit, predicts expected outcome distribution. Required for PC error injection when result returns.

properties.name: d_outcomes
properties.description: Number of outcome classes / distribution dim

code:
_op{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn({{d_outcomes}}, {{d_model}}).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_op{{_id}}_b = np.zeros({{d_outcomes}}, dtype=np.float32)
_op{{_id}}_pre = np.dot({{action_hidden}}.reshape(1, -1), _op{{_id}}_W.T) + _op{{_id}}_b
_op{{_id}}_mean = np.mean(_op{{_id}}_pre, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_op{{_id}}_var = np.var(_op{{_id}}_pre, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_op{{_id}}_normed = (_op{{_id}}_pre - _op{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_op{{_id}}_var + {{eps}})
_op{{_id}}_exp = np.exp(_op{{_id}}_normed - np.max(_op{{_id}}_normed, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
{{outcome_dist}} = (_op{{_id}}_exp / (_op{{_id}}_exp.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)).reshape(-1)
